---
title: "Repressions against residents of Kryvyi Rih, 1937–1938"
subtitle: "City population at the time ≈ 197,000<br>With 1,878 documented cases of repressions, the true number is estimated to be at least 20% higher"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
body, .main-container, .container-fluid,
div, section, article, p, hr {
  background-color: #f5f0e8;
}
.main-container {
  max-width: 100%;
  padding: 20rem 15rem;
}
.plot-container, img, .html-widget, canvas {
  background-color: #f5f0e8 !important;
  border: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
}
h3.subtitle, .subtitle {
  font-size: 1.1em;
}
```

```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=9}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggimage)
library(patchwork)
library(showtext)
library(ggtext)
library(here)

# --- fonts ---
font_add_google("IBM Plex Sans", "plex")
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)

# --- palette ---
col_ink <- "#1a1a1a"
col_paper <- "#f5f0e8"
col_red <- "#c0392b"

# --- shared theme ---
theme_repression <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_family = "plex") +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(
        family = "plex", size = 26,
        face = "bold", color = col_ink,
        margin = margin(b = 4)
      ),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(
        family = "plex", size = 22, face = "bold",
        color = col_ink, margin = margin(b = 10)
      ),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 20, color = col_ink),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(12, 16, 12, 12)
    )
}

# ============================================================
# PANEL 1: barbed wire charges bar chart
# ============================================================
charges <- read_csv(here("data/charges.csv")) %>%
  mutate(
    is_espionage = str_detect(charge, "[Ee]spionage|[Ss]py"),
    charge = str_wrap(charge, 30),
    charge = fct_reorder(charge, n),
    charge = fct_relevel(charge,
      "Other (18 further charges)",
      "Unknown",
      after = 0
    )
  )

wire_plain <- here("figs/Barbed_wire.png")
wire_red <- here("figs/Barbed_wire_red.png")

knot_data <- charges %>%
  mutate(img = if_else(is_espionage, wire_red, wire_plain)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(x_pos = list(seq(3, n, by = 38))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  unnest(x_pos)

p1 <- ggplot(charges, aes(x = n, y = charge)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = n, y = charge, yend = charge, color = is_espionage),
    linewidth = 1.4
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = col_red, "FALSE" = col_ink), guide = "none") +
  geom_image(
    data = knot_data,
    aes(x = x_pos, y = charge, image = img),
    size = 0.04
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n, color = is_espionage),
    hjust = -0.4, size = 7, family = "plex"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.3)),
    breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title    = "Charges",
    subtitle = paste0("<span style='color:", col_red, "'>31% faced espionage charges</span><br>Most were workers with no access to any state secrets")
  ) +
  theme_repression() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 14)),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = -0.82),
    plot.subtitle = element_markdown(hjust = 3.45, halign = 0, face = "bold")
  )

# ============================================================
# PANEL 2: person grid — sentences
# ============================================================

sentences <- read_csv(here("data/sentences_5cat.csv"))

verdict_order <- c(
  "Executed",
  "Labor camp (8-10 years)",
  "Labor camp (3-7 years)",
  "Other / Unknown",
  "Exile / deportation"
)

person_imgs <- c(
  "Executed" = here("figs/Person_red.png"),
  "Labor camp (8-10 years)" = here("figs/Person_dark_grey.png"),
  "Labor camp (3-7 years)" = here("figs/Person_light_grey.png"),
  "Other / Unknown" = here("figs/Person_dark_purple.png"),
  "Exile / deportation" = here("figs/Person_light_purple.png")
)

icon_scale <- 19L

person_counts <- sentences %>%
  mutate(verdict = factor(verdict, levels = verdict_order)) %>%
  arrange(verdict) %>%
  mutate(icons = pmax(round(n / icon_scale), 1L)) %>%
  mutate(icons = if_else(row_number() == 1L,
    icons + (round(sum(n) / icon_scale) - sum(icons)),
    icons
  )) %>%
  pull(icons, name = verdict)

n_icons <- sum(person_counts) # 99
n_cols <- 7L
n_rows <- ceiling(n_icons / n_cols) # 15
x_gap <- 1.5 # horizontal spacing multiplier
y_gap <- 1.5 # vertical spacing multiplier

person_grid <- tibble(
  verdict = rep(verdict_order, times = person_counts[verdict_order])
) %>%
  mutate(
    idx = row_number(),
    x   = (idx - 1L) %% n_cols * x_gap + 1,
    y   = (n_rows - (idx - 1L) %/% n_cols) * y_gap,
    img = person_imgs[as.character(verdict)]
  )

legend_df <- tibble(
  verdict = factor(verdict_order, levels = verdict_order),
  img = person_imgs[verdict_order],
  x = seq(1, (n_cols - 1) * x_gap + 1, length.out = 5),
  y = -0.8,
  label = verdict_order %>%
    str_replace(" \\(", "\n(") %>%
    str_replace("/ ", "/\n")
)

p2 <- ggplot(person_grid, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  geom_image(aes(image = img), size = 0.044) +
  geom_image(data = legend_df, aes(x = x, y = y, image = img), size = 0.044) +
  geom_text(
    data = legend_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y - 0.9, label = label),
    hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, angle = 90,
    size = 5.6, family = "plex", color = col_ink, lineheight = 0.85
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1 - x_gap * 0.5, (n_cols - 1) * x_gap + 1 + x_gap * 1.2), expand = expansion(0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-8, n_rows * y_gap + y_gap * 0.5), expand = expansion(0)) +
  coord_fixed(clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title    = "Sentences",
    subtitle = paste0("Each figure<br>≈", icon_scale, " people")
  ) +
  theme_repression() +
  theme(
    plot.title        = element_text(hjust = 0),
    plot.subtitle     = element_markdown(hjust = 0, face = "bold"),
    legend.position   = "none",
    axis.text         = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks        = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(0, "pt"),
    panel.background  = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
    plot.margin       = margin(0, 16, 12, 0)
  )

# ============================================================
# COMPOSE
# ============================================================

(p1 | p2) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(5, 2)) &
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = col_paper, color = NA),
    panel.border = element_blank()
  )
```

---

<div style="display:flex; justify-content:flex-end; font-size:0.8em; color:#666; margin-top:20px;">
  <table style="border-collapse:collapse; text-align:left;">
    <tr>
      <td style="font-weight:bold; padding-right:12px; white-space:nowrap; vertical-align:top;">Data source</td>
      <td>Melnyk, Oleksandr. 2017. <em>Repressions of 1937–1938 in Kryvyi Rih</em>. Kryvorizhzhia: A Look into the Past.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="font-weight:bold; padding-right:12px; white-space:nowrap; vertical-align:top;">Visualisation</td>
      <td>Olena Tykhostup &middot; <a href="https://github.com/Olena-Tykhostup/kryvyi-rih-repressions-1937-38" style="color:#666;">github.com/Olena-Tykhostup/kryvyi-rih-repressions-1937-38</a></td>
    </tr>
  </table>
</div>
